flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of South Carolina-Columbia fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of South Carolina-Columbia are 30% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($62.2k vs $47.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of South Carolina-Columbia rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (26.4k → 29.8k).
